sourcesContent:
import { assetReferences } from "./assetReferences";
import {
  maramTee,
  vayalHoodie,
  kaaduSweatshirt,
  thattuCargo,
  aazhomTee,
  kalamHoodie,
  mazhaJacket,
  poovuShorts,
} from "../assets";

const referenceByLabel = new Map(assetReferences.map((reference) => [reference.label, reference]));

export const products = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "Maram Tee",
    price: 1299,
    category: "Tees",
    sizes: ["S", "M", "L", "XL"],
    description: "Organic cotton tee with hand-drawn tree motif.",
    color: "#C8E6C9",
    image: maramTee,
    reference: referenceByLabel.get("Maram Tee"),
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "Vayal Hoodie",
    price: 2799,
    category: "Hoodies",
    sizes: ["S", "M", "L", "XL", "XXL"],
    description: "Oversized hoodie inspired by Kerala paddy fields.",
    color: "#B2DFDB",
    image: vayalHoodie,
    reference: referenceByLabel.get("Vayal Hoodie"),
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: "Kaadu Sweatshirt",
    price: 2299,
    category: "Sweatshirts",
    sizes: ["S", "M", "L", "XL"],
    description: "Forest-washed heavy fleece sweatshirt.",
    color: "#A5D6A7",
    image: kaaduSweatshirt,
    reference: referenceByLabel.get("Kaadu Sweatshirt"),
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: "Thattu Cargo",
    price: 3499,
    category: "Bottoms",
    sizes: ["S", "M", "L", "XL"],
    description: "Wide-leg cargo with embroidered hem detail.",
    color: "#D7CCC8",
    image: thattuCargo,
    reference: referenceByLabel.get("Thattu Cargo"),
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: "Aazhom Tee",
    price: 1499,
    category: "Tees",
    sizes: ["M", "L", "XL"],
    description: "Depth-themed graphic on heavyweight cotton.",
    color: "#B0BEC5",
    image: aazhomTee,
    reference: referenceByLabel.get("Aazhom Tee"),
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: "Kalam Hoodie",
    price: 2999,
    category: "Hoodies",
    sizes: ["S", "M", "L"],
    description: "Script-printed zip hoodie in earth tones.",
    color: "#FFCCBC",
    image: kalamHoodie,
    reference: referenceByLabel.get("Kalam Hoodie"),
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    name: "Mazha Jacket",
    price: 4299,
    category: "Outerwear",
    sizes: ["S", "M", "L", "XL"],
    description: "Rain-season coach jacket, water-resistant shell.",
    color: "#CFD8DC",
    image: mazhaJacket,
    reference: referenceByLabel.get("Mazha Jacket"),
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    name: "Poovu Shorts",
    price: 1799,
    category: "Bottoms",
    sizes: ["S", "M", "L", "XL", "XXL"],
    description: "Floral-dyed relaxed shorts for warm days.",
    color: "#F8BBD9",
    image: poovuShorts,
    reference: referenceByLabel.get("Poovu Shorts"),
  },
];

export const categories = ["All", ...new Set(products.map((product) => product.category))];
